input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A hand holds a silver smartphone, displaying its rear camera lens and flash sensor against a blurred background. A lower-third graphic overlays the bottom left, revealing the text "JOHN VELASCO - @JOHN_C_VELASCO" next to a green Android robot icon. The "ANDROID AUTHORITY" watermark persists in the bottom right corner. The device tilts slightly within the grip.</think><answer></answer>

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A hand holds a silver smartphone showing its rear camera, overlaid by a lower-third graphic reading "JOHN VELASCO - @JOHN_C_VELASCO" and an "ANDROID AUTHORITY" watermark. [6-10] The devices are displayed side-by-side; the left unit has a matte white back, while the right unit features a highly reflective, mirror-like silver finish. [10-12] Finally, the phones stand upright on a wooden table with screens displaying "Welcome to Xperia" setup prompts, flanked by a red handset on a stand and an orange accessory. [14-18] Two smartphones on a table switch color variants; the left unit transitions from a champagne gold finish to bright white, then reveals a light blue metallic frame, while the right device shifts from a bronze-gold tone to a polished silver chrome look. Both screens display identical setup interfaces with static time and weather widgets, flanked by a red handset on a stand and an orange case. [18-22] The footage cuts to a black silhouette of the Android robot on a white background, transitioning into the full 'ANDROID AUTHORITY' logo featuring a green robot character

[68-72] A hand holds a light gold smartphone while a finger drags a brightness slider across the top. The display shows "12:03 PM", "TUE, FEB 14", and weather widgets beneath the semi-transparent menu. The finger moves down to point at a widget displaying "32°" and "FLATIRON DISTRICT". App icons sit at the bottom against a blurred wooden floor.
[72-76] A "Welcome to Xperia START HERE!" dialog remains visible centrally. The finger points at the weather widget again before hovering near the bottom right edge of the device frame. Fingers adjust their grip near the corner. The "ANDROID AUTHORITY" watermark stays fixed in the bottom right corner throughout.
Observations recorded during this period.

[84-86] On a black smartphone, a white "Settings" menu with a blue header is shown. [88-90] The screen displays a large white 'N' on a purple abstract background; the user taps the logo repeatedly. [90-92] The display returns to the home screen showing 11:40 AM, weather details, and a dock with icons. A central popup states "Welcome to Xperia START HERE!" on the black Sony device held by two hands.

[92-98] A black smartphone displays a home screen featuring a purple abstract wallpaper and a central dialog box reading 'Welcome to Xperia START HERE!'. The clock widget updates from 11:40 AM to 11:41 AM. Hands hold the device steady against a blurred wooden floor. The user's thumb interacts with the bottom left, swiping away the widget to reveal the navigation bar. [98-100] The view transitions to the rear of a silver smartphone held by a person in a grey hoodie. The back panel features a circular camera lens and a vertical sensor strip in the top left corner. The metallic surface reflects light against a blurred background, with the 'ANDROID AUTHORITY' watermark visible.

recent_thinks: [12-14] Two smartphones stand vertically on a light wooden table, screens illuminated with setup interfaces. A red phone rests on a white stand to the left, and an orange case sits to the right. The left device's frame appears to shift from silver to a champagne gold hue as lighting reflects off the metallic surfaces.

[22-24] The footage returns to hands holding two smartphones side-by-side. The left device features a dark bezel and purple wallpaper, while the right unit has a silver frame with a white interface. Both screens display the time 11:58 and weather widgets. A dark watch strap is visible on the left wrist, with a blurred orange object in the background.

[58-60] A hand holds a light gold smartphone displaying the time 12:03 PM. A finger swipes down from the top right corner, pulling down a dark notification panel that shows connectivity icons and the text 'No notifications' overlaid on the home screen interface.

[100-102] The rear view of a silver smartphone is held steady, showing the camera lens and sensor array. Suddenly, the LED flash below the lens activates, emitting a blindingly bright white light that creates a large flare across the metallic back panel and obscures part of the device's surface.

[102-104] The silver smartphone is held horizontally by two hands, displaying a camera application interface on the screen. The viewfinder shows a bright, overexposed scene of a room with people and equipment. The device orientation has shifted from the rear-facing flash demonstration to active camera usage.

queries.question: How many times did smartphones appear standing on the table?

[6-10] The devices are displayed side-by-side; the left unit has a matte white back, while the right unit features a highly reflective, mirror-like silver finish. [10-12] Finally, the phones stand upright on a wooden table with screens displaying "Welcome to Xperia" setup prompts, flanked by a red handset on a stand and an orange accessory.

[14-18] Two smartphones on a table switch color variants; the left unit transitions from a champagne gold finish to bright white, then reveals a light blue metallic frame, while the right device shifts from a bronze-gold tone to a polished silver chrome look. Both screens display identical setup interfaces with static time and weather widgets, flanked by a red handset on a stand and an orange case. [18-22] The footage cuts to a black silhouette of the Android robot on a white background, transitioning into the full 'ANDROID AUTHORITY' logo featuring a green robot character next to 'ANDROID' in a green rectangle and 'AUTHORITY' in dark grey text, remaining static against a light grey backdrop.

[24-32] Two hands hold smartphones side-by-side, making minor angle adjustments against a blurred background. The left device retains a dark frame with purple wallpaper, while the right unit features a silver metallic frame and white interface; both screens consistently show "11:58". As the hands tilt the phones to catch the light, reflections shift across the glossy displays, notably a bright circular flash on the right screen. The "ANDROID AUTHORITY" watermark remains fixed in the bottom right corner throughout the sequence.

[32-36] A single hand holds a light-colored smartphone with a metallic frame against a blurred wooden background. The screen displays a white interface with the time "12:02 PM" on "TUE, FEB 14" and weather widgets showing "32°". The hand rotates the device to reveal a smooth, pale gold rear panel featuring a vertical "XPERIA" logo and a camera module in the upper right corner. [36-40] The scene cuts to a dark smartphone with a silver frame held in two hands. The background now features red computer towers with purple lighting. The screen initially shows a purple wallpaper with a "Welcome to Xperia" prompt before turning completely black. The "ANDROID AUTHORITY" watermark is visible in the bottom right corner.

recent_thinks: [12-14] Two smartphones stand vertically on a light wooden table, screens illuminated with setup interfaces. A red phone rests on a white stand to the left, and an orange case sits to the right. The left device's frame appears to shift from silver to a champagne gold hue as lighting reflects off the metallic surfaces.

[22-24] The footage returns to hands holding two smartphones side-by-side. The left device features a dark bezel and purple wallpaper, while the right unit has a silver frame with a white interface. Both screens display the time 11:58 and weather widgets. A dark watch strap is visible on the left wrist, with a blurred orange object in the background.

[40-42] The hands rotate the dark smartphone with a silver frame to reveal its thin side profile. The screen remains black and off. The background continues to show blurred red computer towers with purple lighting. The right thumb rests near the side buttons as the device is turned vertically.

[42-44] The hands adjust the silver-framed smartphone, turning it from a side view back to face the camera with a black screen. The background continues to show blurred red computer cases with purple lighting, and the Android Authority watermark remains in the bottom right corner.

[44-46] A pair of hands holds a silver smartphone with a black screen, tilting it to show the top bezel where the "SONY" logo is printed. The background features a row of red computer cases with purple internal lighting. The device remains powered off with a dark display as the hands adjust its position slightly.

[46-48] A hand holds a silver smartphone vertically, showcasing its highly reflective, mirror-like rear panel and camera module. The scene changes to a wooden table surface where a pink phone rests on a white stand to the left, and an orange case sits nearby on the right side.

queries.question: What is the color of the wristband worn on the person's left wrist while holding the smartphones? A. Silver B. White C. Black D. Red

samples.output: <think>A hand holds a silver smartphone vertically, displaying a highly reflective, mirror-like rear panel above a light wooden table. To the left, a pink handset rests on a white stand connected by a red cable, while a bright orange case sits on the right side of the surface near white charging cables.</think><answer></answer>

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A hand holds a silver smartphone showing its rear camera, overlaid by a lower-third graphic reading "JOHN VELASCO - @JOHN_C_VELASCO" and an "ANDROID AUTHORITY" watermark. [2-6] The view shifts to two smartphones, one white and one glossy black with "XPERIA" logos, held together as the lower-third graphic fades out. [6-10] The devices are displayed side-by-side; the left unit has a matte white back, while the right unit features a highly reflective, mirror-like silver finish. [10-12] Finally, the phones stand upright on a wooden table with screens displaying "Welcome to Xperia" setup prompts, flanked by a red handset on a stand and an orange accessory. [14-18] Two smartphones on a table switch color variants; the left unit transitions from a champagne gold finish to bright white, then reveals a light blue metallic frame, while the right device shifts from a bronze-gold tone to a polished silver chrome look. Both screens display identical setup interfaces with static time and weather widgets, flanked by a red handset on a stand and an orange case. [18-22] The footage cuts to a black silhouette of the Android robot on a white background, transitioning into the full 'ANDROID AUTHORITY' logo featuring a green robot character
Observations recorded during this period.

[84-86] On a black smartphone, a white "Settings" menu with a blue header is shown. The user scrolls past "Backup & reset", "Assist", "Date & time", "Languages & input", and "Accessibility" to select "About phone". [86-88] The interface transitions to the "About phone" menu with a blue header, listing "Software update", "Diagnostics", and "Android version" as the user scrolls down. [88-90] The screen displays a large white 'N' on a purple abstract background; the user taps the logo repeatedly. [90-92] The display returns to the home screen showing 11:40 AM, weather details, and a dock with icons. A central popup states "Welcome to Xperia START HERE!" on the black Sony device held by two hands.

[92-98] A black smartphone displays a home screen featuring a purple abstract wallpaper and a central dialog box reading 'Welcome to Xperia START HERE!'. The clock widget updates from 11:40 AM to 11:41 AM. Hands hold the device steady against a blurred wooden floor. The user's thumb interacts with the bottom left, swiping away the widget to reveal the navigation bar. [98-100] The view transitions to the rear of a silver smartphone held by a person in a grey hoodie. The back panel features a circular camera lens and a vertical sensor strip in the top left corner. The metallic surface reflects light against a blurred background, with the 'ANDROID AUTHORITY' watermark visible.

[100-102] A silver smartphone is held steady, showing its rear camera lens before the LED flash activates, emitting a bright white light that flares across the metallic back panel. [102-104] Held horizontally by two hands, the device displays a camera application interface with a bright, overexposed room scene in the viewfinder. [104-106] Manual control overlays appear, displaying text such as "WB AUTO", "EV ±0.0", "SS 1/2000", and "Focus AF" as a thumb interacts with the touchscreen to adjust settings. [106-108] The user's left thumb taps icons on the left edge while the right hand supports the device; pinkish light reflects off the skin. The "SONY" logo is visible on the left bezel, and "ANDROID AUTHORITY" appears in the bottom right corner.

recent_thinks: [12-14] Two smartphones stand vertically on a light wooden table, screens illuminated with setup interfaces. A red phone rests on a white stand to the left, and an orange case sits to the right. The left device's frame appears to shift from silver to a champagne gold hue as lighting reflects off the metallic surfaces.

[22-24] The footage returns to hands holding two smartphones side-by-side. The left device features a dark bezel and purple wallpaper, while the right unit has a silver frame with a white interface. Both screens display the time 11:58 and weather widgets. A dark watch strap is visible on the left wrist, with a blurred orange object in the background.

[58-60] A hand holds a light gold smartphone displaying the time 12:03 PM. A finger swipes down from the top right corner, pulling down a dark notification panel that shows connectivity icons and the text 'No notifications' overlaid on the home screen interface.

[108-110] The user's left thumb interacts with icons on the left edge of the smartphone's camera interface. The device is held horizontally, displaying a viewfinder of a room with a table. Pink lighting reflects off the hands holding the silver phone, while the right hand remains steady near the shutter button.

[110-112] The user's left thumb taps the left side of the horizontal screen, briefly triggering a dark menu overlay displaying "SUPERIOR AUTO" text. The viewfinder then returns to showing the room scene. Pink lighting continues to reflect off the hands holding the silver smartphone.

[112-114] Two hands hold a silver smartphone horizontally, displaying a camera application viewfinder showing a room interior with a table. The left thumb rests near the left edge of the screen while the right hand supports the device. Pink lighting reflects off the skin, and an "ANDROID AUTHORITY" watermark is visible in the bottom right corner.

queries.question: What is the color of the wristband worn on the person's left wrist while holding the smartphones? A. Silver B. White C. Black D. Red

samples.output: <think>The silver smartphone now rests flat on a light wooden table, shown in a close-up side profile view. The metallic edge reflects ambient light, highlighting a physical button on the frame. In the blurred background, a white stand and a red object are visible. The camera remains static on this profile shot.</think><answer></answer>

A red phone rests on a white stand to the left, while an orange case sits nearby. The screens display the time 11:58 along with weather widgets. The footage highlights color variants shifting under lighting and features the Android Authority watermark throughout the comparison sequence.

samples.output:
<think>A hand holds a light gold smartphone as a finger swipes down from the top edge, revealing a dark blue notification panel. The menu displays the time 12:03 PM and date Tue, Feb 14 alongside connectivity icons. The finger then interacts with a horizontal slider bar near the top of the expanded interface against a blurred wooden background.</think><tool_call>
{"name": "compress", "arguments": {"time_range": [50, 58], "text": "[50-54] A hand sets a silver smartphone with a mirror-finish back onto a wooden table, allowing it to stand upright. To the left, a pink phone rests on a white stand with a red cable, while an orange case sits to the right. The hand releases the device and moves out of frame. [54-56] A person wearing a green sweater holds the smartphone horizontally, revealing a dark green, highly reflective rear panel. The \"XPERIA\" logo appears centrally on the back, accompanied by a camera module in the top right corner. [56-58] A hand holding the smartphone flips it from a light gold rear panel to reveal the front display. The illuminated screen shows the time \"12:03 PM\", date \"TUE, FEB 14\", and weather widgets. A central dialog box reads \"Welcome to Xperia START HERE!\". The person wears a blue sweater and dark wristband against a blurred wooden floor."}}
</tool_call>

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A hand holds a silver smartphone showing its rear camera, overlaid by a lower-third graphic reading "JOHN VELASCO - @JOHN_C_VELASCO" and an "ANDROID AUTHORITY" watermark. [2-6] The view shifts to two smartphones, one white and one glossy black with "XPERIA" logos, held together as the lower-third graphic fades out. [6-10] The devices are displayed side-by-side; the left unit has a matte white back, while the right unit features a highly reflective, mirror-like silver finish. [10-12] Finally, the phones stand upright on a wooden table with screens displaying "Welcome to Xperia" setup prompts, flanked by a red handset on a stand and an orange accessory. [14-18] Two smartphones on a table switch color variants; the left unit transitions from a champagne gold finish to bright white, then reveals a light blue metallic frame, while the right device shifts from a bronze-gold tone to a polished silver chrome look. Both screens display identical setup interfaces with static time and weather widgets, flanked by a red handset on a stand and an orange case. [18-22] The footage cuts to a black silhouette of the Android robot on a white background, transitioning into the full 'ANDROID AUTHORITY' logo featuring a green robot character

[24-32] Two hands hold smartphones side-by-side, making minor angle adjustments against a blurred background. The left device retains a dark frame with purple wallpaper, while the right unit features a silver metallic frame and white interface; both screens consistently show "11:58". As the hands tilt the phones to catch the light, reflections shift across the glossy displays, notably a bright circular flash on the right screen. The "ANDROID AUTHORITY" watermark remains fixed in the bottom right corner throughout the sequence.

[32-36] A single hand holds a light-colored smartphone with a metallic frame against a blurred wooden background. The screen displays a white interface with the time "12:02 PM" on "TUE, FEB 14" and weather widgets showing "32°". The hand rotates the device to reveal a smooth, pale gold rear panel featuring a vertical "XPERIA" logo and a camera module in the upper right corner. [36-40] The scene cuts to a dark smartphone with a silver frame held in two hands. The background now features red computer towers with purple lighting. The screen initially shows a purple wallpaper with a "Welcome to Xperia" prompt before turning completely black. The "ANDROID AUTHORITY" watermark is visible in the bottom right corner.

From 40-46s, hands rotate a silver-framed smartphone with a black screen, revealing its thin side profile and the 'SONY' logo on the top bezel against a background of blurred red computer towers with purple lighting. The 'ANDROID AUTHORITY' watermark is visible. At 46s, the view shifts to the device's rear, showcasing a highly reflective, mirror-like silver panel and camera module. The phone is held over a wooden table where a pink handset rests on a white stand connected by a red cable to the left, and an orange case sits to the right near white charging cables.

[50-54] A hand sets a silver smartphone with a mirror-finish back onto a wooden table, allowing it to stand upright. To the left, a pink phone rests on a white stand with a red cable, while an orange case sits to the right. The hand releases the device and moves out of frame. [54-56] A person wearing a green sweater holds the smartphone horizontally, revealing a dark green, highly reflective rear panel. The "XPERIA" logo appears centrally on the back, accompanied by a camera module in the top right corner. [56-58] A hand holding the smartphone flips it from a light gold rear panel to reveal the front display. The illuminated screen shows the time "12:03 PM", date "TUE, FEB 14", and weather widgets. A central dialog box reads "Welcome to Xperia START HERE!". The person wears a blue sweater and dark wristband against a blurred wooden floor.

[22-24] The footage returns to hands holding two smartphones side-by-side. The left device features a dark bezel and purple wallpaper, while the right unit has a silver frame with a white interface. Both screens display the time 11:58 and weather widgets. A dark watch strap is visible on the left wrist, with a blurred orange object in the background.

[58-60] A hand holds a light gold smartphone displaying the time 12:03 PM. A finger swipes down from the top right corner, pulling down a dark notification panel that shows connectivity icons and the text 'No notifications' overlaid on the home screen interface.

[60-62] A hand holds a light gold smartphone as a finger swipes down from the top edge, revealing a dark blue notification panel. The menu displays the time 12:03 PM and date Tue, Feb 14 alongside connectivity icons. [10-12] Finally, the phones stand upright on a wooden table with screens displaying "Welcome to Xperia" setup prompts, flanked by a red handset on a stand and an orange accessory. [14-18] Two smartphones on a table switch color variants; the left unit transitions from a champagne gold finish to bright white, then reveals a light blue metallic frame, while the right device shifts from a bronze-gold tone to a polished silver chrome look. Both screens display identical setup interfaces with static time and weather widgets, flanked by a red handset on a stand and an orange case. [18-22] The footage cuts to a black silhouette of the Android robot on a white background, transitioning into the full 'ANDROID AUTHORITY' logo featuring a green robot character

[32-36] A single hand holds a light-colored smartphone with a metallic frame against a blurred wooden background. The screen displays a white interface with the time "12:02 PM" on "TUE, FEB 14" and weather widgets showing "32°". The hand rotates the device to reveal a smooth, pale gold rear panel featuring a vertical "XPERIA" logo and a camera module in the upper right corner. [36-40] The scene cuts to a dark smartphone with a silver frame held in two hands. The background now features red computer towers with purple lighting. The screen initially shows a purple wallpaper with a "Welcome to Xperia" prompt before turning completely black. The "ANDROID AUTHORITY" watermark is visible in the bottom right corner.

A central dialog box reads "Welcome to Xperia START HERE!". The person wears a blue sweater and dark wristband against a blurred wooden floor.

A hand holds a light gold smartphone against a blurred wooden floor background. As the finger drags the slider, the screen transitions from the dark menu to an intensely bright, washed-out white state, indicating increased brightness. [14-18] Two smartphones on a table switch color variants; the left unit transitions from a champagne gold finish to bright white, then reveals a light blue metallic frame, while the right device shifts from a bronze-gold tone to a polished silver chrome look. Both screens display identical setup interfaces with static time and weather widgets, flanked by a red handset on a stand and an orange case. [18-22] The footage cuts to a black silhouette of the Android robot on a white background, transitioning into the full 'ANDROID AUTHORITY' logo featuring a green robot character

[68-72] A hand holds a light gold smartphone while a finger drags a brightness slider across the top. App icons sit at the bottom against a blurred wooden floor.
